Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw: {"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.","opinion":"As a nurse in Bologna, navigating conversations on COVID vaccines is both challenging and vital. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion: As a nurse in Bologna, navigating conversations on COVID vaccines is both challenging and vital. My days balancing patient care with managing online debates leave me thoughtful. With children at home and values rooted in health, I approach these dialogues with empathy yet firmness. Understanding backgrounds matters; acknowledging valid concerns while sharing evidence-based facts creates trust. Being an Atheist who enjoys football and yoga doesn't hinder connecting across beliefs. Moderation scores hint at openness to dialogue—using that to foster respectful exchanges is key. Prioritize patient safety but validate their feelings, bridging gaps with compassion in these polarized times.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Toiled through healthcare ethics, vaccine communication strategies, persona insights guided tone; balanced empathy and authority referencing medical data for accuracy.
